java.lang.Object

public final class Arrays extends Object

  • Method Details

    • asList

      public static List<Boolean> asList(boolean[] array)
      Parameters:
      array - an array
      Returns:
      null if the array is null; otherwise, a list containing the array elements

    • asList

      public static boolean equals(boolean[] array, Object o)
      Parameters:
      array - an array
      o - an object to compare to
      Returns:
